# CSA Legacy Python Workflow for ATS 2020 Central Sleep Apnea Abstract

This public repository preserves a legacy Python workflow for the central sleep apnea cohort described in an indexed ATS 2020 abstract.

Scholarly record:

- Title: Spectrum of Central Sleep Apnea at an Academic Sleep Center Between 2016-2018 and Treatment Responses to CPAP vs. Adaptive Servo Ventilation
- Authors: J. Sellman; B. W. Locke; J. McFarland; F. Uribe; K. Sundar
- Venue: American Thoracic Society 2020 International Conference; American Journal of Respiratory and Critical Care Medicine 2020;201(Supplement_1):A2430
- DOI: https://doi.org/10.1164/ajrccm-conference.2020.201.1_MeetingAbstracts.A2430

It is not the code repository for the later CPAP-prescribing publication. The separate downstream Stata repository for that final paper workflow is:

https://github.com/reblocke/CSA-CPAP-Prescribing

## Use

Run the legacy Python workflow with:

```bash
python DataAnalysis.py --input data/private/CSA-Db-Working.xlsm --output-dir outputs/legacy-python
```

The original patient-level workbook is restricted EHR/sleep-center data and is not public. Users must supply an authorized local workbook matching the expected historical column layout in DATA_DICTIONARY.md.

## Important Files

- README.md: human-readable overview, workflow, data restrictions, citation, and license guidance.
- CITATION.cff: machine-readable repository software citation metadata plus the ATS 2020 preferred citation.
- abstract/ats-2020-summary.md: author-written abstract metadata and repository relationship summary.
- DATA_DICTIONARY.md: expected workbook columns, derived fields, and category mappings.
- REPRODUCING.md: local reproduction workflow with restricted data.
- DataAnalysis.py and ReadExcel.py: legacy Python source code.
- tests/fixtures/synthetic_csa_workbook.xlsx: synthetic no-PHI smoke-test workbook.

## Safety

Do not add raw clinical data, PHI, credentials, local path files, private manuscript drafts, full publisher abstract text, or publisher-formatted article files. Historical generated PNG/XLSX files were moved out of the default branch and archived in the legacy-python-outputs-2026-06-03 GitHub release.
